extraction.one_line_summary: SAGAN Peter jumped early when leadout trains disintegrated inside 1km, held off EWAN Caleb after late crash scattered sprint
tactical_patterns: Quickstep launched rider attack with 1.6km remaining despite bringing no designated sprinter, forcing leadouts to chase prematurely.
SAGAN exploited moment when rival sprinters hesitated at 200m after their trains collapsed, launching well before traditional sprint initiation.
Seven-rider team format left MEZGEC Lucas isolated doing solo chase work for EWAN, dying before finale commenced.

rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: demonstrated tactical opportunism to win despite not being traditional pure sprinter in disorganized finale
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: lost leadout support early when MEZGEC exhausted himself chasing Quickstep move, couldn't respond to SAGAN's timing
rider_signals.MEZGEC Lucas: negative: forced into extended wind-taking 1.6km out with no teammates to rotate, compromised EWAN's sprint positioning
